name: Mustard Vinegar Based
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl and stir until well mixed.
2. Allow the mixture to sit for at least 24 hours before using, as it will continue to develop flavor.
3. Once ready, use the mustard vinegar as a mop or finishing sauce on pork dishes, such as hams.
4. The sauce improves with age, so store any leftovers in an airtight container and use within several months.
